title: Mun Paniya Lyrics Nandha
stanzas:
Mun paniya mudhal mazhaiya
en manadhil yedho vilugiradhe
vilugiradhe uyir nenaigiradhe
ho oh..

puriyaadha uravil nindren
ariyaadha sugangal kandaen
maattram thandhaval
neethaane.

Mun paniya mudhal mazhaiya
en manadhil yedho vilugiradhe
vilugiradhe uyir nenaigiradhe

manasil yedhay maraikkum kiliye
manasa thorandhu solladi veliye
kalaya kadandhu nee
vandhadhu edharkku
kannukuulle oru
ragasiyam irukku
manasa thorandhu solladi veliye

un vizhiyinil
un vizhiyinil
adhanai ippodhu
kandu pudithu vitten

idhu vara enakillai
mugavarigal
adhai naan kandaen
un punnagaiyil
vazhgiren naan
un moochile..

Mun paniya mudhal mazhaiya
en manadhil yedho vilugiradhe
vilugiradhe uyir nenaigiradhe
ho oh..

salanga kulunga alaiye
sangadhi enna solladi
veliye
karayil vandhu nee
thulluvadherkku
nelappa pudichikka
nenappadhu edharkku
elo elo yelo elo...

en padhaigal
en padhaigal
unadhu vali paathu
vandhu mudiyudhadi

iravayum pagalyum
maattri vittaai
enakkul unnai nee
oottrivittaai
moolginen naan
un kannilae..

Mun paniya mudhal mazhaiya
en manadhil yedho vilugiradhe
vilugiradhe uyir nenaigiradhe
ho oh..

seo.title: Mun Paniya Lyrics Nandha

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Mun Paniya'?

'Mun Paniya' expresses deep emotions of love and longing, highlighting the beauty of romantic connections.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Nandha'?

In Nandha, this song reflects the protagonist's feelings and struggles in love, enhancing the emotional depth of the narrative.

Who are the singers and music director of 'Mun Paniya'?

The song features the melodious voices of Malgudi Subha and SPB, with music composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was 'Mun Paniya' released?

'Mun Paniya' was released on November 14, 2001, as part of the movie Nandha.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mun Paniya, the heartfelt lyrics and soothing melody encapsulate the essence of love and yearning. The song unfolds in a pivotal moment of Nandha, where the protagonist grapples with his emotions, making it a significant part of the narrative. The collaboration between Malgudi Subha and SPB adds a rich layer of depth, evoking nostalgia and tenderness. Overall, this song beautifully conveys the complexities of love, leaving listeners enchanted.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mun Paniya from the film Nandha is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Malgudi Subha and the legendary SPB, this song weaves a magical tapestry of emotions. Yuvan's soulful composition paired with Pazhani Bharathi's poignant lyrics makes it a timeless classic that resonates with every heart.
stanzaMeanings: The first rain is somehow stirring something in my heart, making me feel alive.
I stand in a place that doesn't make sense, seeing dreams that are unclear, you are the one who brings change.
The first rain is somehow stirring something in my heart, making me feel alive.
Oh bird, what you hide in your mind, reveal it to me; you came crossing the boundaries for a reason, there is a secret in your eyes, reveal it to me.
I have forgotten my heart, lost it somewhere along the way.
Now I have found it in your eyes, I see it clearly.
This is not for me, I have seen it in your smile, I live in your breath.
The first rain is somehow stirring something in my heart, making me feel alive.
The waves are crashing, tell me what is happening; you came to me in my dreams, what is this feeling?
My words, my words, are now in your hands, they are not complete.
My nights, my nights, are fading away as I look at your face.
You have changed the night and day, you have filled me with yourself, I am lost in your eyes.
The first rain is somehow stirring something in my heart, making me feel alive.
